---
title: "Top Signals"
---

```{python}
#| echo: false
from _common import get_conn, resolve_quarter
conn = get_conn()
period = resolve_quarter(conn)  # THIRTEEN_F_QUARTER 환경변수 사용

conn.execute(
    """
    SELECT ticker, cusip, total_score, consensus_score, conviction_score,
           continuity_score, cloning_quality_score
    FROM total_scores
    WHERE period_of_report = ?
    ORDER BY total_score DESC NULLS LAST
    LIMIT 50
    """,
    (period,),
).fetchdf()
```

## Top 10 시그널 해석 (LLM 자동 생성)

```{python}
#| echo: false
#| output: asis
from thirteen_f.core.config import load_settings
from thirteen_f.llm import explain_top_signals

_settings = load_settings()
_explain = explain_top_signals(
    conn, period, api_key=_settings.google_api_key,
    top_n=10, model=_settings.google_model,
)
if _explain:
    print(_explain)
else:
    print(
        "_시그널 해석 비활성화 (`.env`에 `GOOGLE_API_KEY` 설정 시 자동 활성화)._"
    )
```
